title: lobelia gaudichaudii subsp. koolauensis
intro: Lobelia gaudichaudii subsp. koolauensis, also known as Hawaiian lobelia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lobelia gaudichaudii subsp. koolauensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from muscle and joint pain. Lobelia gaudichaudii subsp. koolauensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
